BarnesHutLayout - org.graphstream.ui.layout.springbox中的类
Base implementation of a Barnes-Hut space decomposition and particle interaction algorithm to be used for force-based layout algorithms.
BarnesHutLayout() - 类的构造器 org.graphstream.ui.layout.springbox.BarnesHutLayout
New 2D Barnes-Hut simulation.
BarnesHutLayout(boolean) - 类的构造器 org.graphstream.ui.layout.springbox.BarnesHutLayout
New Barnes-Hut simulation.
BarnesHutLayout(boolean, Random) - 类的构造器 org.graphstream.ui.layout.springbox.BarnesHutLayout
New Barnes-Hut simulation.

bulkElements() - 类中的方法 org.graphstream.ui.graphicGraph.StyleGroup
Iterable set of elements that can be drawn in a bulk operation, that is the subset of all elements that are not dynamic or modified by an event.

byClass - 类中的变量 org.graphstream.ui.graphicGraph.stylesheet.StyleSheet.NameSpace
The set of rules for this kind of elements with a given class.
byId - 类中的变量 org.graphstream.ui.graphicGraph.stylesheet.StyleSheet.NameSpace
The set of rules for this kind of elements with a given identifier.
ByteDecoder - org.graphstream.stream.binary中的接口
Decode an event that has been encoded into a binary buffer and dispatch this event to its sources.
ByteEncoder - org.graphstream.stream.binary中的接口
Define an encoder that transform received events into a binary buffer.
ByteEncoder.Transport - org.graphstream.stream.binary中的接口
Define the object that will be called after an event has been transformed into a binary buffer.
ByteFactory - org.graphstream.stream.binary中的接口
 
ByteProxy - org.graphstream.stream.binary中的类
This class is a proxy that can exchange event binary-encoded (opposed to text-encoder) with another proxy.
ByteProxy(ByteFactory, int) - 类的构造器 org.graphstream.stream.binary.ByteProxy
Create a new ByteProxy, in server mode, which will be bound to a local address and the given port.
ByteProxy(ByteFactory, ByteProxy.Mode, InetAddress, int) - 类的构造器 org.graphstream.stream.binary.ByteProxy
Complete constructor of the proxy.
ByteProxy.Mode - org.graphstream.stream.binary中的枚举
Defines the mode of this proy, server or client.
